## Manually Verified Additions (SRL-T)

The following entries were added after the automated scan, verified directly against source files.

### File: `SRL-T/osr/map/map.simba` (additions)

#### `Map` (variable)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/map.simba:1532`
- **Signature**: `{$H-}Map: TRSMap;{$H+}`
- **Summary**: Global TRSMap singleton. The primary entry point for chunk loading and Walker access. Call Map.SetupChunk() once before any map operations.
- **Related**: `TRSMap`, `TRSWalkerV2`, `ERSChunk`, `Objects`, `NPCs`
- **Uncertainty**: Declared inside {$H-}...{$H+} compiler hint directives — missed by initial scan regex.

### File: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobjectarray.simba` (additions)

#### `Banks` (variable)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobjectarray.simba:708`
- **Signature**: `{$H-}Banks: TRSBanks;{$H+}`
- **Summary**: Global TRSBanks singleton for bank-location data, analogous to Objects but specialized for bank objects.
- **Related**: `TRSBanks`, `TRSObjectJSONParser`, `Bank`
- **Uncertainty**: Declared inside {$H-}...{$H+} compiler hint directives — missed by initial scan regex.

### File: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba` (field additions)

#### `TRSMapObject.TrackTarget` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:29`
- **Signature**: `TrackTarget: Boolean;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSMapObject (parent of TRSObjectV2 and TRSNPCV2). Default parameter value for Hover() and WalkHover(). Set True to keep tracking the target across detection attempts.
- **Related**: `TRSMapObject`, `TRSObjectV2`, `TRSNPCV2`, `TRSMapObject.Hover`, `TRSMapObject.WalkHover`

#### `TRSMapObject.Filter` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:31`
- **Signature**: `Filter: record Walker: Boolean; Minimap: Boolean; Finder: Boolean; UpText: Boolean; end;`
- **Summary**: Nested record in TRSMapObject. Controls which detection passes are active: Walker (world-coord), Minimap (dot filter), Finder (color search), UpText (text verify). All True by default.
- **Related**: `TRSMapObject`, `TRSObjectV2`, `TRSNPCV2`

#### `TRSMapObject.Coordinates` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:21`
- **Signature**: `Coordinates: TPointArray;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSMapObject. World-coordinate tile positions. Populated by Objects.Get() or set manually via SetupEx coordinates parameter.
- **Related**: `TRSMapObject`, `TPointArray`

#### `TRSMapObject.Finder` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:23`
- **Signature**: `Finder: TRSObjectFinder;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSMapObject. Holds CTS2 color definitions for mainscreen color detection. Append colors: obj.Finder.Colors += [CTS2(...)].
- **Related**: `TRSMapObject`, `TRSObjectFinder`, `TCTS2Color`

#### `TRSMapObject.Walker` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:26`
- **Signature**: `Walker: PRSWalkerV2;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSMapObject. Must be set to @Map.Walker before any Hover/WalkHover/Click/WalkClick. A nil Walker crashes at runtime.
- **Related**: `TRSMapObject`, `PRSWalkerV2`, `TRSWalkerV2`, `Map`

#### `TRSMapObject.Size` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:20`
- **Signature**: `Size: Vector3;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSMapObject. Three-dimensional tile size (X width, Y depth, Z height). Used to project a bounding box onto the mainscreen.
- **Related**: `TRSMapObject`, `Vector3`

#### `TRSObjectV2.ObjType` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:436`
- **Signature**: `ObjType: Int32;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSObjectV2. Object-type integer ID from game data.
- **Related**: `TRSObjectV2`, `TRSMapObject`
- **Uncertainty**: unclear from source — exact valid values not stated.

#### `TRSObjectV2.Rotations` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:437`
- **Signature**: `Rotations: TSingleArray;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSObjectV2. Rotation angles for multi-orientation objects.
- **Related**: `TRSObjectV2`, `TSingleArray`
- **Uncertainty**: unclear from source — unit of rotation values not specified.

#### `TRSNPCV2.Level` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:686`
- **Signature**: `Level: Int32;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSNPCV2. Combat level of the NPC.
- **Related**: `TRSNPCV2`, `TRSMapObject`

#### `TRSNPCV2.DotType` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:687`
- **Signature**: `DotType: ERSMinimapDot;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSNPCV2. Specifies which minimap dot category to filter. Set to ERSMinimapDot.NPC for standard NPCs.
- **Related**: `TRSNPCV2`, `ERSMinimapDot`

#### `TRSNPCV2.DotFilters` (field)
- **File**: `SRL-T/osr/map/mapobject.simba:688`
- **Signature**: `DotFilters: TRSDotFilterArray;`
- **Summary**: Field of TRSNPCV2. Array of polygon/area filters restricting which minimap dots are accepted. Add entries via AddFilter().
- **Related**: `TRSNPCV2`, `TRSDotFilterArray`
